firstLivePass.result: quotes posted and cleaned up, controlled fills skipped
firstLivePass.rootCause: The local preview classifier treated any 0x-prefixed value in a preview response—including commitment hashes and module addresses—as evidence that a transaction had been sent.
firstLivePass.safetyImpact: No unsafe transaction was sent. Oversize previews correctly failed before transaction submission; the first pass then stopped the fill branch and cleaned all quotes to zero open.

fix: Transaction evidence now requires an explicit txHash/transactionHash/transaction_hash field or txSent:true. Commitment hashes and addresses do not count.
